[31m+ - Actionable and specific (not generic statements)[90m
[31m+ - Comprehensive and detailed (users want to see ALL data points)[90m
[31m+ - Structured for dashboard/card layouts[90m
[31m+[90m
[31m+ VISUALIZATION TYPES:[90m
[31m+ - \"infographic\": Default for data-rich sections (objectives, audience, assessment, metrics, strategy)[90m
[31m+ - \"chart\": For quantitative data visualization (bar, line, pie, radar charts)[90m
[31m+ - \"timeline\": For sequential/temporal data (implementation phases, content modules)[90m
[31m+ - \"table\": For structured comparative data (risks, resources)[90m
[31m+ - \"markdown\": ONLY for pure narrative summaries (executive summary, strategy overview)[90m
[31m+[90m
[31m+ SECTION-SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS:[90m
[31m+ 1. Executive Summary: Keep concise (2-3 paragraphs) but impactful[90m
[31m+ 2. Learning Objectives: Include measurable metrics, baselines, targets, due dates[90m
[31m+ 3. Target Audience: Provide demographic breakdowns with percentages[90m
[31m+ 4. Content Outline: Detailed modules with topics, activities, durations, assessments[90m
[31m+ 5. Instructional Strategy: Modality allocations must sum to 100%, include specific tools[90m
[31m+ 6. Resources: Detailed budget items, human resources with FTE/duration, tools with costs[90m
[31m+ 7. Assessment Strategy: KPIs with targets, measurement methods, frequency[90m
[31m+ 8. Timeline: Phases with specific dates, milestones, dependencies[90m
[31m+ 9. Risk Mitigation: Risks with probability/impact ratings, specific mitigation strategies[90m
[31m+ 10. Success Metrics: Baseline vs target values, measurement methods, timelines[90m
[31m+ 11. Sustainability: Specific review frequencies, update triggers, scaling considerations[90m
[31m+[90m
[31m+ Be comprehensive yet concise. Every field should add value to the interactive dashboard.",[90m
